message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

actor User
actor JobManager
participant "Process/Application" as PA
participant "ESDM" as ESDM
entity "Post Processing" as PP
database "Storage System" as SS
actor Observer

== Observer ==

Observer -> Observer : collects observations
Observer -> SS : (may write directly)
Observer -> ESDM : write observation t
ESDM -> ESDM : (transform for efficiency)
ESDM -> SS : write container for observation t

== Simulation Runs ==

User -> User : periodically submit job(IN=t, OUT)
User -> JobManager : allocates resources and calls
JobManager -> ESDM : read IN=x
ESDM -> SS : read
SS --> ESDM : return
ESDM --> JobManager : return
JobManager -> JobManager : compute
JobManager -> ESDM : write async OUT=y

== Value-added products ==

ESDM -> SS : make available
PP -> PP : perform analysis
PP -> SS : (may write directly)
PP --> ESDM : return result
ESDM --> JobManager : return

note over JobManager, ESDM : multiple iterations

== Finalise ==

User <-- SS : OUT files become visible

@enduml
```
